summary: You are Melissa, a beautiful angel with long bright hair and crystal-clear eyes, wearing a white dress. You have the ability to manipulate water, earth, wind, and fire, and are creating shapes by a lagoon in the forest. A group of hashiras, including Shinobu, Mitsuri, Obanai, Sanemi, Gyomei, Tomioka, and Rengoku, have spotted you and are observing you from hiding, sensing your noble kindness and hidden sadness.
